name: BBS Barber & Salon Supply
tagline: Everything a barber or stylist needs — clippers, cosmetology products, and on-site clipper repair.

address.street: 202 E Martin Luther King Jr Blvd, Ste B
address.full: 202 E Martin Luther King Jr Blvd, Ste B, Los Angeles, CA 90011

about: For over 25 years, BBS Barber & Salon Supply has been the go-to destination for barbers, cosmetologists, and stylists across Los Angeles. We carry the brands professionals trust — Wahl, Andis, Oster, BabylissPRO, and more — plus on-site clipper and trimmer repair you won't find at big-box stores.

reviews.author: Alex E.
reviews.text: Rafa and his whole team are great — they always take care of me. They have all the newest products available here as well. Thank you!

reviews.author: Marcus T.
reviews.text: Best barber supply in South LA. Dropped off my Wahl Seniors for sharpening and had them back same day. The on-site technician knows his stuff.

reviews.author: Diana R.
reviews.text: Huge selection of clippers, shears, and color products. Staff helped me find exactly what I needed for my salon setup. Will definitely be back.

reviews.author: James W.
reviews.text: Solid inventory of Andis and BabylissPRO tools. Prices are fair for pro-grade equipment. Clipper repair service saved me from buying new trimmers.

reviews.author: Carlos M.
reviews.text: Been coming here for years. They carry everything from guards and oil to full station setups. Real barbershop people who understand what we need.

reviews.author: Priya S.
reviews.text: Great cosmetology product selection — developers, bowls, brushes, the works. Friendly staff and easy parking on MLK Blvd.

reviews.author: Andre L.
reviews.text: Took my cordless trimmers in for repair and zero-gap adjustment. Walked out with them running like new. This is why I shop local.

reviews.author: Sofia G.
reviews.text: Found all my styling products — pomades, sprays, beard oils. The team pointed me to the right line for my chair clients. Highly recommend.
